close_reason: Replaced Arc<Mutex<UpdateBar>> with mpsc channel. No nested locking.

title: Investigate Y-down coordinate issues in SkinGaugeGraphObject and SkinTextBitmap
description:
Y-flip exploration agent found two potential Y-coordinate issues that need runtime verification:

1. SkinGaugeGraphObject (result/skin_gauge_graph_object.rs:382-405): Uses negative height draw trick (region_y + region_height, -region_height) inherited from Java/LibGDX Pixmap Y-flip. In wgpu Y-down, Pixmap and screen share the same Y direction so the flip may be unnecessary, causing the gauge graph to render upside-down on the Result screen.

2. SkinTextBitmap (skin_text_bitmap.rs:128,153,167): Uses region_y + offset_y + region_height as glyph Y position. In LibGDX Y-up this pointed to the top of the text region; in wgpu Y-down it should be region_y + offset_y. However, this needs runtime verification since the select screen text renders correctly.

Both require reaching the affected screens in-game to confirm whether they're actual visual bugs.
close_reason: Not actionable: SkinGaugeGraphObject::draw() is no-op (rendering not yet implemented); SkinTextBitmap text renders correctly on select screen per issue description
